title: cryptostylis apiculata
intro: Cryptostylis apiculata, also known as the 'Tiger Orchid', is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Australia. The medicinal properties of this plant include its use in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. It has been reported to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing swelling and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Cryptostylis apiculata typically involve drying and powdering the roots, which can then be used in various forms, including capsules, tinctures, and infusions.
